Metadata.appTitle: PasteQR | QR scanning without a camera
Metadata.appDescription: Paste, drag, or upload an image and extract QR code contents instantly in your browser.
Metadata.scannerTitle: PasteQR | Scan QR codes from images
Metadata.scannerDescription: Extract QR code contents from screenshots, saved images, and clipboard images without using a camera.

Scanner.heroDescription: Paste, drag, or upload an image to extract QR code contents instantly without a camera.
Scanner.uploadTitle: Drag an image here or click to upload
Scanner.uploadDescription: Screenshots, saved images, and any other image files are supported.

tips.cameraFree: Scan from images without opening the camera
tips.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop image files into the page
tips.urlOpen: Detected URLs can be opened right away

errors.invalidFileType: Only image files can be uploaded.
errors.unreadableQr: No QR code could be detected in that image. Try another one.
errors.emptyClipboard: No image was found in the clipboard. Try pressing Ctrl+V directly.
errors.clipboardPermission: Clipboard access is required. Try pressing Ctrl+V directly.
